form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 57-day let-up. First-up after four months 9th of 11 at this track on February 14 over 1800m, 18 len behind No Problem carrying 55kg at $15.30. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at this track on October 26 over 1600m, 10 len behind Pepper X carrying 55kg at $23.30. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground when fly jumping at start.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start ran last of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1800m, 25 len behind Vet Captain carrying 57kg at $19.40. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 11 at this track on February 14 over 1800m, 5 len behind No Problem carrying 55kg at $12.20. Others preferred at this stage.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 10 at this track February 7 over 1600m, 17 len behind Vet Captain with 55.5kg at $21.10. First up last campaign third of 11 at this track October 4 over 1800m, soft track; 3 len behind Jeomsuni Go with 55.5kg at $10.90. Can return with a bold run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at start, then ridden wide in early stages.
Slow into stride. Bumped outwards at 600m.
Shifted out at 1450m turn and bumped runner.
Lay out and shifted out at 700m.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start 5th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1800m, 11 len behind Vet Captain with 52.5kg at $23.50. Before that 6th of 10 at this track on February 7 over 1600m, 21 len behind Vet Captain with 52kg at $8. Better than that recent ordinary performance suggests.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 56 days. Last outing ran last of 15 at this track in LR on February 15 over 1200m, 23 len behind Speed Young with 57kg at $152.70. At only start last preparation 11th of 13 at this track in LR on November 30 over 1200m, on a slow track; 17 len behind Magic Potion carrying 57kg at $125.70. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start 8th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1800m, 18 len behind Vet Captain with 55kg at $3.30. The run before that favourite; scored a big 13 len win at this track February 8 over 1800m defeating Tanseongui Banseok carrying 55kg at $8.20. Better than that recent moderate performance suggests.
